name: private-buddy
description: Private Buddy - A private AI chat assistant

scripts.build:server:mac:amd64: cd server && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 go build -o private-buddy-server ./cmd/
scripts.build:server:mac:arm64: cd server && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 go build -o private-buddy-server ./cmd/
scripts.build:server:win: cd server && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -o private-buddy-server.exe ./cmd/
scripts.build:server:linux: cd server && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o private-buddy-server ./cmd/
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist:mac:amd64: npm run build:server:mac:amd64 && npm run build && ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --mac --x64 --config.directories.output=dist-electron/mac/amd64
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build:server:mac:arm64 && npm run build && ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config.directories.output=dist-electron/mac/arm64
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:server:win && npm run build && ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --win --config.directories.output=dist-electron/win/amd64
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:server:linux && npm run build && ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --linux --config.directories.output=dist-electron/linux/amd64
